case_title: RUFF, STACY L. VS RITROVATO, NICHOLAS A. C/O US SECURIT/ & EXCH.COMM

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RUFF, STACY L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RITROVATO, NICHOLAS A. C/O US SECURIT/ & EXCH.COMM DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE. PARTIES SETTLED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-04-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-08-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,132.00 FILED BY RUFF, STACY L. AS TO DEFENDANT RITROVATO, NICHOLAS A. C/O US SECURIT/ & EXCH.COMM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF RUFF, STACY L.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT RUFF, STACY L. DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE. PARTIES SETTLED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY RITROVATO, NICHOLAS A. C/O US SECURIT/ & EXCH.COMM AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT RUFF, STACY L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
POS SUBMITTED TO COURT. PARTY NOT NAMED.
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT PAPERS TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
